title: Found constant as an input of $and
body:
I ran the script below and assume that cells like $and with constant zeros will be opted.
How can I help with this?

```
read_verilog -defer some_big_design.v 
tee -o hier_design.log hierarchy -top design

proc
flatten
dff2dffe
opt -fine -mux_bool
memory -nomap;
memory_unpack
pmuxtree; wreduce; opt -fine -mux_bool
clean -purge

```

```
        "_08965_": {
          "hide_name": 1,
          "type": "$and",
          "parameters": {
            "A_SIGNED": 0,
            "A_WIDTH": 1,
            "B_SIGNED": 0,
            "B_WIDTH": 1,
            "Y_WIDTH": 1
          },
          "port_directions": {
            "A": "input",
            "B": "input",
            "Y": "output"
          },
          "connections": {
            "A" : ["_04710_"],
            "B" : [[0]],
            "Y" : [["_02266_", 31]]
          }
        },
```
code_blocks:
read_verilog -defer some_big_design.v 
tee -o hier_design.log hierarchy -top design

proc
flatten
dff2dffe
opt -fine -mux_bool
memory -nomap;
memory_unpack
pmuxtree; wreduce; opt -fine -mux_bool
clean -purge
